name: google-antigravity-codex
description: Codex skills and MCP tools for Google Antigravity: direct OAuth login, agy CLI sessions, and Code Assist tools.

interface.longDescription: Google Antigravity Codex provides Codex skills and an MCP stdio server with direct Google Antigravity OAuth login (PKCE), the official agy CLI session, and optional token-export reuse. It includes chat, writing, releases, models, diagnostics, and capability-gated grounding and image tools. Provider calls require explicit user consent.
defaultPrompt: Run an Antigravity plugin doctor check.
List available Antigravity models and route this task.
Use Antigravity to help with this coding or writing task after consent.
